description_blurb:
This document is a Mission Report (MISREP), a standardized reporting form the U.S. Military uses to record the circumstances surrounding its operations. U.S. military services often use MISREPs to report Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) to AARO. The GENTEXT, or “general text” section of these reports often contains important qualitative, contextual information, distinguishing it from the more quantitative, or numerical, data found elsewhere in the report.
A U.S. military operator reported observing two UAP traveling at an estimated speed of 278 knots (320 mph. The observer reported that the UAP “increased speed and changed direction towards the south.”
All descriptive and estimative language contained in this report reflects the reporter’s subjective interpretation at the time of the event. Such characterizations should not be interpreted as a conclusive indication of the presence or absence of any intrinsic object features or performance characteristics.
title: DOW-UAP-D5, Mission Report, Arabian Gulf, 2020
summary: This document is a Mission Report (MISREP) from the Department of War, detailing UAP observations. A U.S. military operator observed a UAP traveling at 40 knots between FL160 and FL170, maintaining constant speed. Later, the same operator observed two possible UAPs traveling at an estimated 278 knots, which then increased speed and changed direction towards the south. The report contains qualitative and contextual information in the GENTEXT section.
reported_object_description: One UAP observed, then two possible UAPs observed.
reported_behavior: One UAP traveled at 40 knots at FL160-FL170 with constant speed. Two possible UAPs traveled at an estimated 278 knots, then increased speed and changed direction towards the south.
bust_reasoning: The bust score is relatively high due to the single visual sensor modality and the lack of truly anomalous kinematic features. While the objects were unidentified by the military operator, their described speeds (40 knots and an estimated 278 knots) and behaviors (constant speed, increasing speed, changing direction) are all plausible for known prosaic objects such as high-altitude balloons, drones, or conventional aircraft. The use of 'estimated' velocity and 'possible UAPs' for the second event further reduces the certainty of an anomalous explanation. There is no multi-sensor corroboration or any reported behavior that resists easy explanation.

GENTEXT/UAP
* Description: ~~S//REL~~ AT 1354Z, 1.4(a) OBSERVED 1X UAP IVO 34SCE7566990098. VELOCITY WAS 40 KNOTS AT FL160 TO FL170. UAP SPEED REMAINED CONSTANT.

[redacted]

1.4(a)



# DOW-UAP-D5, Mission Report, Arabian Gulf, 2020 - Page 6

1.4(a)

GENTEXT/UAP
• Description: ~~S//REL~~ AT 2243Z, 1.4(a) OBSERVED 2X POSS UAPS IVO 35TQK1580995057. VELOCITY WAS ESTIMATED AT 278 KNOTS. UAPS INCREASED SPEED AND CHANGED DIRECTION TOWARDS THE SOUTH.

(b) (6) [redacted]
1.4(a) [redacted]
cover_up_reasoning: The document exhibits substantial concealment. Multiple pages are almost entirely redacted, with one page explicitly stating 'The remainder of the page is redacted.' Significant sentence-level black-bar redactions are present on pages containing the UAP descriptions. The identity and context of the observer are withheld under FOIA exemptions 1.4(a) (classified national security information) and (b)(6) (personal privacy), indicating that the information was considered sensitive and classified. The striking through of the 'S//REL' (SECRET//RELEASABLE) marking further confirms the original classified nature of the document.
summary_zh: 本文件为一份来自美国战争部的任务报告（MISREP），详细说明了UAP观测情况。一名美国军事操作员观测到一个UAP以40节的速度在FL160至FL170空层之间飞行，并保持恒定速度。随后，同一操作员观测到两个可能的UAP以估计278节的速度飞行，随后加速并向南改变方向。该报告在GENTEXT部分包含定性和背景信息。
reported_object_description_zh: 观测到一个UAP，随后观测到两个可能的UAP。
reported_behavior_zh: 一个UAP以40节的速度在FL160-FL170空层飞行，并保持恒定速度。两个可能的UAP以估计278节的速度飞行，随后加速并向南改变方向。
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥得分相对较高，原因在于单一视觉传感器模式且缺乏真正异常的运动学特征。尽管这些物体未被军事操作员识别，但其描述的速度（40节和估计278节）和行为（恒定速度、加速、改变方向）对于已知普通物体，如高空 H气球、无人机或常规飞机而言，均属合理。第二次事件中“估计”速度和“可能的UAP”的表述进一步降低了异常解释的确定性。缺乏多传感器佐证，也无任何难以解释的报告行为。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件存在大量隐瞒。多页内容几乎完全被编辑删除，其中一页明确注明“本页其余部分已编辑删除”。包含UAP描述的页面存在显著的句子级黑条编辑删除。观察员的身份和背景根据《信息自由法》豁免条款1.4(a)（涉密国家安全信息）和(b)(6)（个人隐私）被隐瞒，表明该信息被视为敏感和机密。“S//REL”（SECRET//RELEASABLE）标记被划掉，进一步证实了该文件最初的机密性质。
claims: A U.S. military operator observed 1x UAP traveling at 40 knots at FL160 to FL170, maintaining constant speed.
A U.S. military operator observed 2x possible UAPs traveling at an estimated 278 knots.
The UAPs increased speed and changed direction towards the south.
claims_zh: 一名美国军事操作员观测到1个UAP以40节的速度在FL160至FL170空层飞行，并保持恒定速度。
一名美国军事操作员观测到2个可能的UAP以估计278节的速度飞行。
这些UAP加速并向南改变方向。
bust_explanations: High-altitude balloon (weather, surveillance, or hobby): The first observation of an object traveling at 40 knots at FL160-FL170 is consistent with the behavior of a high-altitude balloon, which can maintain relatively slow, constant speeds at those altitudes.

Military drone: Both observations could potentially be attributed to military drones. The 40-knot object could be a slow-moving surveillance drone, while the 278-knot object with increasing speed and direction change is well within the capabilities of many known military drones.

Distant aircraft: The second observation of 'possible UAPs' traveling at an estimated 278 knots, increasing speed, and changing direction is entirely consistent with the behavior of conventional aircraft, especially when observed from a distance where identification is difficult.
bust_explanations_zh: 高空 H气球（气象、侦察或业余）：首次观测到的物体以40节的速度在FL160-FL170空层飞行，这与高空 H气球的行为一致，后者可在该高度保持相对缓慢、恒定的速度。
军用无人机：两次观测都可能归因于军用无人机。40节的物体可能是一个慢速侦察无人机，而278节且加速和改变方向的物体则完全在许多已知军用无人机的能力范围之内。
远距离飞机：第二次观测到的“可能的UAP”以估计278节的速度飞行、加速并改变方向，这与常规飞机的行为完全一致，尤其是在远距离观测难以识别的情况下。
cover_up_indicators: Multiple pages (1, 2, 3, 4) are almost entirely redacted
Page 2 explicitly states 'The remainder of the page is redacted'
Sentence-level black-bar redaction across multiple pages (5, 6)
Observer's identity and context redacted under 1.4(a) (classified national security information)
Observer's identity and context redacted under (b)(6) (personal privacy)
cover_up_indicators_zh: 多页（1、2、3、4页）内容几乎完全被编辑删除
第2页明确注明“本页其余部分已编辑删除”
多页（5、6页）存在句子级黑条编辑删除
观察员身份和背景根据1.4(a)（涉密国家安全信息）被编辑删除
观察员身份和背景根据(b)(6)（个人隐私）被编辑删除
